Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Who else gets bad karma if a person commits suicide?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2010-11-22 · 2 answers
Hare Krishna.

If a person commits suicide, do the persons relatives or others get any bad karma from that suicide as well?

Thank you for your replies.
user [38] · 2010-11-22
Havent seen any hint of a direct negative karma in Garuda Purana. Indirectly, theyll most probably suffer emotionally.

(Last month I compiled info on ghosts. See VEDAs main page - Duchove FAQ. Google Translator recently quite improved so you should be able to understand.)
user [638] · 2010-11-30
"My dear Sanuc0u257 tana," He said, "if I could attain Kru803 su803 nu803 a by committing suicide, I would certainly give up millions of bodies without a moments hesitation. (u346 ru299 Caitanya Caritu257 mru803 ta Antya 4.55)
